title: How One Empty Pocket Rewires a Godly Man's Attention
caption:
You don't win the fight with your phone in the moment it's strongest. You win it by not being in the room with it.

Charge it somewhere else. Open the Word before you open anything with a red dot on it. Let a quiet moment stay quiet. Decide the rooms it doesn't get to enter, before you're tired enough to let it in anyway.

A godly man's phone doesn't own his hands. It's just in the other room.

#faith #discipline #christianman #selfcontrol #godlyman
